creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
This error appeared again:

Compiling error.c...
cc  -Wall -Wno-format-y2k -Wunused -fPIC -Os -g -fstack-protector -I.. -D_CUPS_SOURCE -I/usr/local/include -O2 -pipe   -fno-strict-aliasing -DOPENSSL_DISABLE_OLD_DES_SUPPORT -D_LARGEFILE_SOURCE  -D_THREAD_SAFE -D_REENTRANT  -c -o error.o error.c
error.c:1: warning: -fstack-protector not supported for this target
In file included from ../cups/raster.h:27,
                 from ../cups/raster-private.h:25,
                 from error.c:31:
../cups/cups.h:34:35: error: dispatch/dispatch.h: No such file or directory
gmake[2]: *** [error.o] Error 1

poudriere build log:

http://eis.bris.ac.uk/~mexas/logs/cups-image-1.7.1.log
